summary_text: ### 修正対象 `/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs` ### 修正内容（diff形式） ```diff --- a/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs +++ b/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs @@ -const { autoReview, PASS_THRESHOLD: AUTO_REVIEW_PASS_THRESHOLD } = require("./lib/auto-review.js"); +const autoReview = require("./lib/auto-review.js"); +const { PASS_THRESHOLD: AUTO_REVIEW_PASS_THRESHOLD } = autoReview; @@ async function runBridge(runState, mode, payload) { + const providerState = readJson(PROVIDER_STATE, { providers: {} }); + const providers = Object.values(providerState?.providers || {}); + const degradedProviders = providers.filter((provider) => Number(provider?.consecutiveFailures || 0) >= 3); + if (providers.length - degradedProviders.length < 2) { + const message = "Blocked: insufficient healthy providers (<2 available)"; + saveState(runState, { phase: "blocked" }); + return { ok: false, code: 1, timedOut: false, stdout: "", stderr: message, summary: message }; + } const args = mode === "matrix" ? [BRIDGE, "--matrix", buildMatrixFile(runState, payload.name, payload.matrix)] : [BRIDGE, "--lane", payload.lane, "--task", payload.task, "--project", runState.project]; @@ function parseReviewScore(text) { const parsed = extractJson(text); + const weightedGroups = [parsed, parsed?.results, parsed?.reviews].filter(Array.isArray); + for (const group of weightedGroups) { + const totals = group + .map((entry) => weightedScore(entry)) + .filter(Boolean); + if (totals.length > 0) { + const weightedTotal = totals.reduce((sum, entry) => sum + entry.score * entry.weight, 0); + const weightSum = totals.reduce((sum, entry) => sum + entry.weight, 0); + if (weightSum > 0) return weightedTotal / weightSum; + } + } if (typeof parsed?.total === "number") return parsed.total; const match = String(text || "").match(/"total"\s*:\s*(\d+)|(\d+)\/10|(\d+)\/7/); return Number(match?.[1] || match?.[2] || match?.[3] || -1); } + +function weightedScore(result) { + const agent = String(result?.agent || result?.name || result?.lane || ""); + const score = Number(result?.score ?? result?.total ?? result?.rating); + if (!agent || !Number.isFinite(score)) return null; + if (/security/i.test(agent)) return { score, weight: 3 }; + if (/(architect|plan)/i.test(agent)) return { score, weight: 2 }; + return { score, weight: 1 }; +} @@ - const autoReviewResult = await autoReview(implementation.summary, { + const autoReviewResult = await autoReview.autoReview(implementation.summary, { agent: "implementer", task: state.task, runId: state.runId, @@ - if (review.ok && reviewScore >= 7) { + // Done criteria: auto-review >=5/7 AND codex-review >=7/10. + if (review.ok && reviewScore >= 7) { const criteria = await doneCriteria(state, autoReviewResult.score, reviewScore); ``` ### 検証結果 `node --check /Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs` は成功しました。 仮定: - `fugue-provider-state.json` の健全性判定は `.providers[*].consecutiveFailures >= 3` を degraded とみなす実装に合わせました。 - review結果の重み付けは、JSON内に `agent` 名を持つ配列 (`results` / `reviews`、または配列本体) がある場合のみ加重平均を適用し、従来の単一 `total` はそのまま維持しています。 補足: - 作業ツリーにはこのファイルの既存差分が別途ありましたが、今回の修正は上記4か所に限定しています。 - 指示どおり、テスト追加や他ファイル変更はしていません。
